name: wpsp-e2e-tests
description: Production-ready Playwright E2E tests for SchedulePress WordPress plugin

scripts.docker:reset: docker-compose down -v && docker-compose up -d && bash docker/wait-for-wp.sh
scripts.cron:run: docker-compose exec -T wpcli wp cron event run --due-now --path=/var/www/html --allow-root
